prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: SPERM WHALE MYOGLOBIN F46V N-BUTYL ISOCYANIDE AT PH 9.0. Entity description: MYOGLOBIN. Organism: Physeter macrocephalus. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived marks: sequence-derived hydrophobic closure tendency. Coordinates, native contacts, residue-residue distances, and validation annotations are unopened before the prediction hash.

V62 same-target repair probe. E61 explicit context marks: cofactor_context heme_context ligand_context. Marks are derived from V61 failure grammar class and RCSB non-coordinate metadata only; no coordinates, contacts, distance maps, ligand geometry, or native topology are opened before sealing.
